# setFlags(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the current authorization flags for the view.

## Declaration

```swift
func setFlags(_ flags: AuthorizationFlags)
```

## Parameters

- **flags**: The authorization flags to set for this view.

## Discussion

You can use this method to change the authorization flag settings made with the [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationView/setAuthorizationRights(_:)] method or to specify flags other than the default ([doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/AuthorizationFlags/kAuthorizationFlagDefaults]) used by the [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationView/setString(_:)] method.

The authorization flags are described in Authorization Options in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/authorization-services].

## Setting up the authorization view

- **setString(_:)**: Sets the requested-right string to use with the default authorization rights set.
- **setAuthorizationRights(_:)**: Sets the authorization rights for this view.
- **setAutoupdate(_:)**: Sets the authorization view to update itself automatically.
- **setAutoupdate(_:interval:)**: Sets the authorization view to update itself at a specific interval.
- **setEnabled(_:)**: Sets the current state of the authorization view.
